topStories.description: US President Donald Trump said that Iranian leaders are “all gone” and that the White House has “nobody left to talk to.

topStories.title: Sri Lanka says it denied US request to land two aircraft at Mattala airport
topStories.description: President Anura Kumara Dissanayake says request made on February 26, two days before US and Israel launched war on Iran.

topStories.title: ‘Enemy defeated…’: Mojtaba Khamenei says Iran dealt enemies ‘dizzying blow’ as conflict with US, Israel drags on
topStories.description: Mojtaba Khamenei further claimed that Israel and the US had the ‘illusion’ that if Ali Khamenei and other military leaders were killed, they would create ‘fear and despair’ and ‘realise the dream of dominating Iran and then dividing it’

topStories.title: Congress high command will decide Cabinet reshuffle: Home Minister
topStories.description: G. Parameshwara says it is natural to have aspirations, and there is nothing wrong in seeking a ministerial post.

topStories.title: CAPF Bill says IPS necessary for Union-State coordination, reserves 50% I-G rank posts for IPS
topStories.description: The Bill seeks to negate a May 23, 2025 Supreme Court judgment which asked the Home Ministry to “progressively reduce” IPS deputation in CAPFs up to the rank of I-Gs in the next two years

dailyNews.title: US says it struck alleged drug trafficking vessel in Pacific, killing two
dailyNews.description: In an initial statement, the US military said three people survived the strike but did not offer additional details.

dailyNews.title: Will Europe be pulled into the Iran war?
dailyNews.description: Europe is under pressure as Trump pushes allies to support the Iran war. How are they responding?

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Doesn't Want Ceasefire In Iran
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump on Friday ruled out reaching a ceasefire agreement with Iran, saying Washington has the upper hand in the three-week-old war.

dailyNews.title: How old is Barron Trump? What we know about US President Donald Trump's youngest son?
dailyNews.description: As Barron Trump turns 20, he is increasingly focused on business and education. He maintains a low profile while attending New York University, with much of his early life kept private, highlighting his preference for a quieter path away from media attention.

dailyNews.title: Walker, Texas Ranger star and martial arts icon Chuck Norris dies at 86
dailyNews.description: A six-time karate champion and action film star, Norris was hospitalised in Hawaii on Thursday for unknown causes.

dailyNews.title: US Could "Take Out" Iran's Kharg Island Any Time: White House
dailyNews.description: Axios reported that Trump was mulling an operation against Kharg to pressure the Islamic republic to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: UK Approves US Using Its Bases To Strike Iran Sites Targeting Ships
dailyNews.description: British ministers met on Friday to discuss the Iran war and Iran's blocking of the Strait of Hormuz, according to a Downing Street statement.

dailyNews.title: Just 5 Votes: Rajya Sabha Poll Math Puts Congress On Edge In Madhya Pradesh
dailyNews.description: With three Rajya Sabha seats from the state set to fall vacant and elections expected in April-May, the battle will hinge on numbers.

dailyNews.title: Iranians celebrate Persian New Year in first wartime Nowruz in decades
dailyNews.description: Residents of Tehran exchange new year's wishes as US and Israeli attacks continue through the spring equinox.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration seeks billions from Harvard over anti-Semitism claims
dailyNews.description: Harvard University has rejected the complaint as 'another pretextual and retaliatory action' from the Trump White House.

dailyNews.title: Russian Quid Pro Quo: Moscow Says Won't Share Intel With Iran If US Cuts Off Ukraine
dailyNews.description: The existence of the proposal has raised eyebrows regarding Russia trying to create a rift between America and Europe.

dailyNews.title: Congress Leaders Switching Sides To Do 'Good Service': Assam BJP
dailyNews.description: The joining programme was held in the presence of Assam BJP President and MP from Darrang-Udalguri, Dilip Saikia.

dailyNews.title: Eid Message: Iran Says It Seeks Peace With Neighbours, Reiterates No Nuclear-Weapon Ambiti
dailyNews.description: President Masoud Pezeshkian calls for regional cooperation and security framework, amid ongoing tensions with the US and Israel.

dailyNews.title: Cuba ‘categorically’ rejects prospect of removing Diaz-Canel in US talks
dailyNews.description: Minister Carlos Fernandez de Cossio says he is open to US trade talks but refused to entertain a leadership shake-up.

dailyNews.title: "Hostile Environment": Team Trump Sues Harvard Over Anti-Israeli Protests
dailyNews.description: Harvard has been a central focus of the president's campaign to force changes at major US universities, which Donald Trump has derided for alleged antisemitic and "radical left" ideologies

dailyNews.title: Assembly elections 2026 updates: Mamata releases TMC manifesto, claims 'unofficial President's Rule' imposed in poll-bound Bengal
dailyNews.description: Himanta Biswa Sarma files nomination from Assam's Jalukbari constituency; Mr. Sarma laid down his objective for Assam, centred around the identity and development of Assam

dailyNews.title: US Education Department transfers student loan management to Treasury Dept — Here's what changes for borrowers
dailyNews.description: The US Education Department has transferred student loans to the Treasury Department, marking a significant step toward the Trump administration's dismantling of the agency. Here's what changes for the borrowers:

dailyNews.title: Trump’s AI framework targets state laws, shifts child safety burden to parents
dailyNews.description: Trump’s AI framework pushes federal preemption of state laws, emphasizes innovation, and shifts responsibility for child safety toward parents while laying out lighter-touch rules for tech companies.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration sues Harvard over treatment of Jewish and Israeli students, seeks to recover billions in funds
dailyNews.description: The Justice Department's lawsuit against Harvard alleges the university is indifferent to antisemitism on campus. The suit aims to enforce compliance and recover taxpayer money, amidst ongoing scrutiny of university practices regarding Jewish and Israeli students.

dailyNews.title: ‘Cowards’: Trump slams NATO over lack of support in US–Israel war on Iran
dailyNews.description: Trump is calling for US allies to help guarantee shipping through the Strait of Hormuz as NATO relocates Iraq personnel.

dailyNews.title: Far-left ex-MSNBC host argues Kamala Harris shouldn't run in 2028, cites Biden policy 'stain'
dailyNews.description: Joy Reid argued Kamala Harris shouldn't run for president again during an interview on Friday, and said the U.S. would never elect a woman president in her lifetime.

dailyNews.title: Feds launch probe to unravel alleged nonprofit funding behind Antifa-linked violence
dailyNews.description: The DOJ, FBI and IRS are investigating nonprofit groups the Trump administration says are funding political violence, under a directive known as NSPM-7.

dailyNews.title: Trump Officials Bypass Congress to Sell Weapons to U.A.E., Kuwait and Jordan
dailyNews.description: Some of the proposed sales, valued at more than $23 billion, were under review, while others were never sent to Congress. The administration is pushing them through without congressional approval.

dailyNews.title: Deferring to Trump, G.O.P. Lawmakers Resist a Public Accounting on Iran
dailyNews.description: Nearly three weeks into a war that polls show is unpopular, top Republicans have yet to call administration officials to testify about it, arguing that hearings would put divisions on display.

dailyNews.title: U.S. Prosecutors Are Investigating Colombia President Gustavo Petro
dailyNews.description: The Justice Department is examining whether President Gustavo Petro of Colombia has ties to drug traffickers.

dailyNews.title: Trump Friend Asked ICE to Detain the Mother of His Child
dailyNews.description: Paolo Zampolli, a former modeling agent and a longtime Trump ally, was in a custody battle over his son. An ICE official agreed to help.

dailyNews.title: A Meatpacking Strike in Colorado Is Another Stress to Trump’s Economy
dailyNews.description: The walkout at the JBS plant in Greeley, Colo., comes as beef prices have soared, cattle supplies have plunged and immigration sweeps have stressed the labor supply.

dailyNews.title: Former Iranian prisoners ask Trump to get Americans held there out
dailyNews.description: Former prisoners in Iran, Emad Shargi and Siamak Namazi, told "Face the Nation" moderator Margaret Brennan their message to President Trump about current Americans held there.
